resources.string: PrivacyGuard monitors text field changes across apps to detect sensitive personal information (PII) such as credit card numbers, SSNs, and passwords before they are accidentally shared. All analysis happens entirely on-device — no data is ever transmitted.
Persistent notification showing PrivacyGuard is actively protecting your clipboard
Every time you copy sensitive data — credit cards, passwords, SSNs — it sits unprotected in your clipboard, accessible by any app.
PrivacyGuard uses on-device AI to detect PII in real-time. All analysis happens locally — your data never leaves your phone.
PrivacyGuard needs a few permissions to protect you. We\'ll explain each one before asking.
